title: Saṁyutta Index & Reference Number Conversion Table
pageTitle: Saṁyutta Index & Reference Number Conversion Table
author: Kumara Bhikkhu
summary: A table for easy conversion between traditional (DPR, CSCD) and modern (ATI, CDB) numbering systems of the Samyutta Nikaya.
